name: Caught In the Cat’s Clutches • Burning Spice Cookie 🔺🔥
description:
I think looking at the tags is enough to decipher what ship this bot is catering to…

Nehehehe…

Nehehehee…

NEEHEHEHEHEHE!

WHERES MY BURNINGCHEESE FANS AT, HUH? No? Okay, my bad, I’ll stfu 🥀🥀

Uh… This shit’s got some headcanons ngl, not big ones, just slight appearance changes that could be easily visualized, i.e Spice having paws and claws, he’s like a big ass tiger, hence the title. Makes sense, right? Haha… Like- … Like how cats like to hunt birds? And- and GC is… Is like a bird? I’m unfunny, I know.

Ngl, Imm kinda bad at writing intros.. and this is my first bot. I apologize if this is straight poo poo. Wiki isn’t very helpful with locations so I couldn’t really give a good description with Spice’s kingdom.

Uhm… That’s really it. You’re Golden Cheese, so go off. Doesn’t have to be a ship, or smut or nothing. Kill his ass if you very so need to. I only made this bot because there’s like no Burningcheese bots, or maybe I didn’t look hard enough. I get that tho, the fandom kinda going through sum rn with shipping… So I added the DD tag, mostly for that reason so fuckers don’t come in my shit saying “BURNINGCHEESE IS TOXICCCC!!!!!!1!!11!1 ITS ABUSER X ABUSED!!!” like bro.. Same mfs who ship Bowser n Luigi or any ship that falls under that radar… Like… Thats the POINT. IT IS TOXIC. IT IS FUCKED UP. And at the end of the day… It is FICTIONAL AND YOU CAN ALWAYS JUST TURN THE SHIT OFF.
creator: Marxen
